Package src.commands

package src.commands
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    ClearCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to clear all elements from the collection.
    CountGreaterThanPriceCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to count elements with price greater than the specified value.
    ExecuteScriptCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to execute a script from a file.
    ExitCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to exit the program without saving.
    HelpCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to display help information for all available commands.
    InfoCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to display information about the collection.
    InsertCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to insert a new element with the specified key.
    PrintFieldDescendingPriceCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to print all price values in descending order.
    PrintUniqueUnitOfMeasureCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to print all unique unit of measure values from the collection.
    RemoveGreaterKeyCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to remove all elements with keys greater than the specified key.
    RemoveKeyCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to remove an element from the collection by its key.
    RemoveLowerCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to remove all elements smaller than the specified element.
    ReplaceIfGreaterCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to replace an element by key if the new value is greater than the old one.
    SaveCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to save the collection to a file.
    ShowCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to display all elements of the collection in string representation.
    UpdateCommand<K extends Comparable<K>, V extends Product>
    Command to update an element in the collection by its ID.
